title: 'Bhabanipur Must Emerge as Frontrunner in Kolkata': Abhishek Banerjee To Party Workers in TMC Internal Meet Ahead of Mega Poll Fight
description: Addressing an internal meeting of party workers in Mamata Banerjee's Bhabanipur constituency, Abhishek Banerjee asked them to inform the public about "fundamental differences" between the TMC government in the state and the BJP in the Centre.
